meta.title: Kilometer 0 Digital
meta.description: Local origin. Digital impact. Connect, transform, and boost from the starting point.

items.title: Starting point
items.desc: The pin marks the departure point: Kilometre Zero, where everything begins.

items.title: Outreach
items.desc: Signal waves symbolise digital reach and how ideas spread.

items.title: Network
items.desc: Connected nodes stand for people, ideas, and opportunities linked together.

items.title: Local transformation
items.desc: Ripples at the base evoke local impact with global resonance.

mission.heading: Born at the origin
mission.body: Kilometer 0 Digital starts at the origin and expands by connecting people, ideas, and opportunities to build a more accessible and innovative digital future.

contact.heading: Shall we talk?
contact.body: We're building the digital future from the origin. Write to us to collaborate or learn about the project.
